## Change

Describe the narrow problem and the chosen behavior.

## Evidence

List tests, server/client versions, and commands run.

## Safety

State transaction, compatibility, credential, data, and failure-mode effects. Write `none` only after checking.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change matches an accepted task or maintainer request.
- [ ] Tests cover success and failure paths.
- [ ] Local quality gates pass.
- [ ] No secret, SQL value, row data, or private fixture is included.
- [ ] Documentation and task evidence are updated.

Submitting a pull request does not guarantee review or acceptance. See `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
